mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_job_posting (tutor_id, subject_id, title, description, price_per_hour, mode, city, available_time, max_students, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{tutorId}, #{subjectId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{pricePerHour}, #{mode}, #{city}, #{availableTime}, #{maxStudents}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tutor_id, subject_id, title, description, price_per_hour, mode, city, available_time, max_students, status, create_time, update_time FROM teacher_job_posting WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, tutor_id, subject_id, title, description, price_per_hour, mode, city, available_time, max_students, status, create_time, update_time FROM teacher_job_posting WHERE status = 1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
